definition:
συντέλεια, -ας, ἡ
 (συντελέω), [in LXX chiefly for כָּלָה and (in Da) for קוּם ;] 
  1. in cl., a joint payment or contribution for public service; hence, generally, joint action (Plat.). 
   2. In late writers (Polyb., al.), consummation, completion: σ. τ. αἰῶνος, -ων (cf. Dan LXX TH Dan.12:13, al.), Mat.13:39-40, 49 24:3 28:20, Heb.9:26.†
 (AS)
